# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Main build commands (one per line)'
        required: true
        type: string
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after build (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for running commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
        default: 'bash'
      environment_variables:
        description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE, one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      runner_os:
        description: 'Operating system for the runner'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - ubuntu-20.04
          - windows-latest
          - windows-2022
          - windows-2019
          - macos-latest
          - macos-13
          - macos-12
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Timeout for the build job in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 30
      continue_on_error:
        description: 'Continue workflow if build fails'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      install_dependencies:
        description: 'Dependency installation commands (one per line)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload (optional)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for the uploaded artifact'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build-artifacts'

jobs:
  custom-build:
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runner_os }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    continue-on-error: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.continue_on_error) }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set environment variables
        if: inputs.environment_variables != ''
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
          while IFS= read -r line; do
            if [ -n "$line" ]; then
              echo "$line" >> $GITHUB_ENV
              echo "Set: ${line%%=*}"
            fi
          done <<< "${{ inputs.environment_variables }}"

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: inputs.install_dependencies != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Installing dependencies..."
          ${{ inputs.install_dependencies }}

      - name: Run pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing pre-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}

      - name: Run build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing main build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.build_commands }}

      - name: Run post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          echo "Executing post-build commands..."
          ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}

      - name: Upload artifacts
        if: inputs.artifact_path != ''
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          if-no-files-found: warn

      - name: Build summary
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "## Build Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Runner OS**: ${{ inputs.runner_os }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Shell Type**: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Working Directory**: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- **Build Status**: ${{ job.status }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          
          if [ "${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}" != "" ]; then
            echo "### Pre-build Commands Executed" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
            echo '
